name: New Hampshire OPLC License Lookup

agency.name: New Hampshire Office of Professional Licensure and Certification

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official OPLC lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: New Hampshire OPLC license records exposed by official lookup, including construction-relevant boards where available
knownExclusions: New Hampshire contractor work may be regulated by state boards, local authorities, or both; this entry only covers OPLC lookup scope.
The OPLC lookup spans many professions; construction-relevant records require careful filtering.
Local permits, municipal contractor licenses, business registrations, and non-OPLC authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not bypass browser or portal controls; prefer official export options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official OPLC lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a state license, local authorization, or registration does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official construction-specific bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for New Hampshire OPLC lookup. Future work should narrow to electrical, mechanical, plumbing, and related boards before parser work.
maintainerNotes: Keep OPLC scope separate from municipal contractor licensing and permits.
